final_answer:
Surgical rename phase is done.

I’ve moved and wired the core folders:
- `bsc` → [`gilt-chain`](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-chain)
- `bsc-genesis-contract` → [`gilt-genesis-contract`](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt-genesis-contract)
- `bsc_implementation.md` → [`gilt_chain_implementation.md`](/srv/repos/gold-chain/gilt_chain_implementation.md) (with updated internal paths)

I also fixed the ignore/tracking edge case so `forge-std` is preserved under the new path, and removed the generated `geth` binary artifact from staging.

Checks run:
- `go build ./cmd/geth` in `gilt-chain` passed.
- `go test ./cmd/geth ./cmd/bootnode -run TestDoesNotExist -count=1` passed (compile-level sanity).

Only historical upstream references remain in changelog/history-style content; functional path references are updated to the new folder names. If you want, I’ll do the commit next in one clean commit.
